cit.basis: 8% corporate (profit) income tax for private/domestic legal entities; 20% for state enterprises and foreign legal entities, under the Turkmen Tax Code.
cit.note: Administered by the Main State Tax Service under the Ministry of Finance and Economy. Hydrocarbon and agreement-based regimes are out of scope for this SME estimator.

personal_income_tax.note: Employment income taxed at a standard rate (simplified estimate).

official_sources.name: Ministry of Finance and Economy of Turkmenistan (Main State Tax Service)

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated figures pending verification against official Ministry of Finance and Economy / Main State Tax Service publications; not for filing or production use without local validation.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified AI estimates for LedgerField.
Entity classification (private vs state/foreign), hydrocarbon regimes, relief and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
